name: Structured Workflow
description: Task-list driven workflow plugin built on TaskFlow. Adds owner-scoped tasklist tools, cache-safe active-workflow guidance, and complex-instruction bootstrap prompts.

forceContinuation.description: Deprecated compatibility flag. Accepted but ignored by vNext.

cancelKeywords.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Accepted but ignored by vNext.

flowDetectionMode.description: How to detect when to inject the tasklist bootstrap prompt.

activationKeywords.description: Keywords that force task decomposition or bootstrap prompting.
